title: Department Name
Department ID
Description
table-309-309.caption: What is the department description for the one whose name has the word computer?
data: Studies theoretical foundations of information and computation and their implementation and application in computer systems.
An engineering discipline that integrates several fields of computer science and electrical engineering required to develop computer hardware and software.
Studies the design, creation, use, and impact of information systems.
Applies principles of engineering to the design, development, testing, and maintenance of software systems.
Deals with generating images with the aid of computers.
